excerpt:
Application dates via the IP Paris application portal
1st session: from October 29, 2025 to January 8, 2026
2nd session: from January 9, 2026 to March 26, 2026
3rd session: from March 27, 2026 to May 28, 2026
Attention: some programs may not open for the 3rd session.
matchedTextBefore: The French National Master's Degree is an internationally recognized degree awarded on behalf of the French State, distinct from non-national institution-specific degrees awarded independently by individual institutions.
matchedText: Application dates via the IP Paris application portal
